source_title: Instability Excellence Portfolio Brochure (Redefining peak performance)
text: Instability excellence Redefining peak performance Redefining peak performance Elevate your expertise for shoulder instability repairs. With solutions ranging from simple to complex, Smith+Nephew’ s Instability Excellence portfolio is setting new standards to take you to the next level while returning your patients to peak performance. No matter the repair, the procedure or the pathology, Smith+Nephew’ s Instability Excellence portfolio has you covered. Regardless of the complexity, you’ll find solutions around the entirety of the glenoid including; soft tissue repairs, boney Bankart repairs and glenoid bone loss. Our Instability Excellence portfolio includes: Our total package of evidence-backed solutions coupled with an extensive medical education program is redefining peak performance so together, we can redefine shoulder repair. Soft tissue and boney Bankart repairs Q-FIX◊ Suture Anchor Consistent deployment1-3 The active deployment against the inserter shaft and the tensioning of the sutures to at least 140N contributes to the low displacement during cyclic loading*4-8 Fixation strength Shown to provide greater fixation strength when compared to other commercially available all-suture anchors** 5,6 * As demonstrated in benchtop testing ** As demonstrated in benchtop testing;(1.8mm) Compared to Zimmer Biomet JuggerKnotTM 1.45 (#1 and #2), Conmed Y-KnotTM Flex 1.3 and Stryker Iconix 1 Improve access to challenging shoulder anatomy with the Q-FIX Curved Drill Guide, complete with intuitive visual and tactile cues. 9 MICRORAPTOR◊ REGENESORB◊ Suture Anchor Compact size The MICRORAPTOR REGENESORB Suture Anchor’ s small diameter (2mm area) and short pilot hole depth (14.8mm) allows you to place multiple anchors for increased points of fixation around the acetabulum or glenoid, contributing to a secure repair. Fixation strength An innovative, rectangular anchor that tapers towards the distal tip to increase points of fixation. MINITAPE Suture A smooth suture tape Low profile and designed to evenly distribute pressure. MICRORAPTOR KNOTLESS Suture Anchor Off-axis insertion With a full-length inserter and a rigid implant design, gain increased access to challenging areas 10 with a greater improved off-axis insertion performance* 11 * As demonstrated in benchtop testing, compared to Arthrex PushLockTM BioComposite 2.9 mm. Based on REGENESORB◊ variant. Fixation strength On average, MICRORAPTOR KNOTLESS Suture Anchor provides significantly (p < 0.001) greater fixation12 - 71% higher anchor fixation strength than Arthrex® Short PushLock BioComposite - 47% higher anchor fixation strength than Arthrex® PushLock BioComposite - 21% higher anchor fixation strength than Stryker® CinchLock SS knotless anchor 30,000 25,000 20,000 15,000 10,000 5,000 0 Peak Load (lbf) MICRORAPTOR KNOTLESS REGENESORB Arthrex ® PushLock Biocomposite Arthrex® Short PushLock BioComposite Stryker® CinchLock SS Fixation in 15 pounds per cubic foot with 95% CI Error Bar 2 0 MONTHS 12 MONTHS 24 MONTHS 6 MONTHS 18 MONTHS REGENESORB◊ Material No other biocomposite can do this. A unique formulation of proven materials. REGENESORB material is designed to provide a jump start in bone healing and formation. Calcium sulfate makes the difference in REGENESORB Material Calcium Sulfate: Works in early healing stages at 4-12 weeks 16-18 ß-TCP: Sustained bone formation for up to 2 years 19, 20 PLGA: Comprised of natural products – lactic acid and glycolic acid 22, 23 4-12 weeks 65% PLGA15% ß-TCP 20% Calcium Sulfate Absorption and bone replacement Timeline of implant REGENESORB material is designed to remain mechanically stable for a minimum of six months** before being absorbed and effectively replaced by bone within 24 months. *13-15,23,24 * Demonstrated clinically and in vivo ** As demonstrated in vitro Glenoid Bone Loss Reach a new level with our comprehensive Glenoid Bone Loss System. A system designed to be accurate, reproducible and efficient every step of the way, leading to an optimized bone graft placement. MiniOpen Latarjet and Bone Block Tray Graft preparation tool The Coracoid Prep Tool provides the ability to securely hold, fully prepare and accurately drill the bone graft with one instrument. Anterior glenoid drill guide Designed to help minimize the breaching of the cortical surface, the anterior drill guide has a 10-degree divergent angle. Posterior Glenoid Drill Guide Hook to secure position on anterior glenoid Ratcheting bullets help to maintain position Double Glenoid Guide with same 10mm drill offset as Coracoid Prep Tool Arthroscopic Latarjet and Bone Block Tray Double ENDOBUTTON◊ Fixation Device A new type of fixation… - Demonstrated healing rates of over 90% in patients with shoulder instability25-30 - Shown to be biomechanically equivalent to screw fixation*31 - Reduced procedure complications due to hardware, when compared to standard screw fixation**32 - In a study of patients with chronic recurrent anterior gleno-humeral instability, 82.1% returned to sport at the preinjury level***28 *As demonstrated in the Latarjet-Bristow procedure **n=27 vs 115 screws ***n=28 Abduction Lateral traction Rotation Flexion Arthroscopic Enabling Technology FLOW 90◊ COBLATION◊ Wand - Significantly faster ablation rate than other frequently used 90-degree arthroscopy wands*37 - Significantly more efficient at ablation than other frequently used 90-degree arthroscopy wands**37 *As demonstrated in vitro when tested at default settings; p
